app.title: Which Party Matches You?
app.subtitle: Malaysia GE16 — Voter Compass
app.tagline: 10 questions. 3 parties. Find your political match.
app.disclaimer: Educational tool. Results based on each coalition's public positions. Always do your own research before voting.
app.privacy: For research, we log your quiz answers and your state (via GPS if you allow, otherwise via IP). No name, email, or login required.
app.footer: Not affiliated with any political party.
app.byline: Made for Malaysian youth — your vote, your future.
lang.label: LANG
result.heading: Your political match is
result.shareCaption: I got matched with {party} on the GE16 Voter Compass! What about you?
q.q1: The government should keep blanket fuel and food subsidies for everyone.
q.q2: The minimum wage should be raised to RM2,000 or higher.
q.q3: Bumiputera privileges and quotas should be expanded and protected.
q.q4: Malaysia should adopt stricter Islamic laws (including hudud) at the federal level.
q.q5: Institutions like the MACC and judiciary must be made fully independent of the Prime Minister.
q.q6: Najib Razak deserves a royal pardon or further sentence reduction.
q.q7: Vernacular schools (Chinese and Tamil) should remain protected and publicly funded.
q.q8: More government scholarships should go to top SPM students regardless of race.
q.q9: Malaysia should deepen economic ties with China, even if it means more Chinese investment.
q.q10: Malaysia should take a stronger stance on Palestine, including cutting all ties with Israel-linked companies.
